evidence_summary: The production must emphasize the grueling environmental hardship of Mars through a sense of vast, desolate isolation. The focus is on the physical toll of a two-hundred-mile trek, utilizing high-contrast textures of sweat, dirt, and parched skin to communi...

The group attempts a two-hundred-mile trek across the Mossy Waste toward Helium. Exhaustion, hunger, and thirst take their toll; one thoat collapses, forcing the party to struggle on foot through the desolate landscape.
